title: Conditional Columns same as form conditioning

posts.author: Dynam (lus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Do we have a feature for columns that works same as the form conditioning i.e if I select A certain answer, a specific column/field appears example if a status is successful, a dropdown column with labels relating to successful appears?

This is for a call center call dispositions.
